name: Vercel Deployments
description: Deployments, projects, domains, env vars, logs via Vercel's official MCP

tools.name: list_deployments
tools.description: List Vercel deployments for all projects or a specific project, with status and URL details

project_id.description: Filter deployments by Vercel project ID or name

state.description: Filter by deployment state: BUILDING, ERROR, INITIALIZING, QUEUED, READY, CANCELED

tools.name: get_deployment
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific Vercel deployment including build logs URL, status, and aliases

deployment_id.description: The Vercel deployment ID or URL to retrieve

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List all Vercel projects in the account or team with their framework, repo, and latest deployment info

search.description: Filter projects by name using a search query

tools.name: get_project
tools.description: Get detailed information about a Vercel project including framework, git integration, and environment variables

project_id.description: The Vercel project ID or name to retrieve

tools.name: create_deployment
tools.description: Trigger a new Vercel deployment for a project from a git branch, commit, or uploaded files

name.description: The Vercel project name to deploy

git_source.description: Git source object with type (github/gitlab/bitbucket), ref (branch), and repoId

target.description: Deployment target environment: production or preview
